title: FFP In Traumatic BRAin INjury (FIT-BRAIN) Trial

skipped_criteria: Inclusion #3: Cerebral trauma confirmed on CT with BIG 3 radiographic findings — requires imaging/radiology data not available in schema.
Inclusion #4: Wallet examined and no power of attorney related to blood product administration identified — requires legal document check not in schema.
Exclusion #1: Known history of adverse reaction to plasma products — requires prior medical history not in schema.

Exclusion #2: Known history of congestive heart failure, renal failure, liver failure, or severe respiratory dysfunction requiring home supplemental oxygen — requires prior medical history not in schema.
Exclusion #3: Persons who are currently incarcerated — requires incarceration status not in schema.
Exclusion #4: Persons with inadequate venous access — requires physical exam finding not in schema.
Exclusion #5: Treatment cannot start within 1 hour of arrival at the hospital — requires temporal/logistical data not in schema.
Exclusion #6: Time of injury is unknown — requires injury time data not in schema.
Exclusion #7: Non-survivable injuries in the estimation of the attending trauma and/or neurosurgeon — requires clinical judgment field not in schema.
Exclusion #8: Interfacility transfers — requires transfer origin data not in schema.

Exclusion #9: Class 3 hemorrhagic shock — requires hemorrhagic shock classification not directly available; partially related to presumed_hemorrhage but shock class cannot be determined from schema fields alone.
Exclusion #10: Known DNR orders prior to randomization — requires advance directive status not in schema.
Exclusion #11: Persons who refuse administration of blood products — requires patient consent/refusal status not in schema.
Exclusion #12: Persons with a research opt-out bracelet — requires opt-out status not in schema.
Exclusion #13: Persons who require FFP for any other indication (e.g., reversal of coagulopathy) — requires clinical indication data not in schema.
